privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for pebl_fmri_gng_adaptation task by confirming that the PEBL Go/No-Go behavioral script is synthetically generated dynamically by setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected script path, stimulus duration (500), ISI duration (2500), Go key ('1'), background color ('black'), foreground color ('white'), and output log file ('gng_fmri_log.csv') exactly match the task description instructions and verifier.py logic.
